panels.title: Log volume per minute (last 1h)
panels.description: Total log volume trend per minute for the last hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(Timestamp) AS time, count() AS logs FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE Timestamp >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND Timestamp <= toDateTime($__to/1000) AND ('${probe_logs}' = 'all' OR coalesce(nullIf(LogAttributes['msg'], ''), JSONExtractString(Body, 'msg')) NOT LIKE 'Log probe:%') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Logs by severity (last 1h)
panels.description: Severity distribution of logs, mapped from Pino levels when SeverityText is empty.

targets.rawSql: WITH logs AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(SeverityText, ''), multiIf(toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 60, 'FATAL', toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 50, 'ERROR', toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 40, 'WARN', toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 30, 'INFO', toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 20, 'DEBUG', toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 10, 'TRACE', 'UNKNOWN')) AS level FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE Timestamp >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND Timestamp <= toDateTime($__to/1000) AND ('${probe_logs}' = 'all' OR coalesce(nullIf(LogAttributes['msg'], ''), JSONExtractString(Body, 'msg')) NOT LIKE 'Log probe:%')) SELECT countIf(level = 'TRACE') AS TRACE, countIf(level = 'DEBUG') AS DEBUG, countIf(level = 'INFO') AS INFO, countIf(level = 'WARN') AS WARN, countIf(level = 'ERROR') AS ERROR, countIf(level = 'FATAL') AS FATAL, countIf(level = 'UNKNOWN') AS UNKNOWN FROM logs

panels.title: Recent logs
panels.description: Latest structured log entries with request context and trace correlation fields.

targets.rawSql: SELECT formatDateTime(Timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS timestamp, coalesce(nullIf(SeverityText, ''), multiIf(toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 60, 'FATAL', toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 50, 'ERROR', toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 40, 'WARN', toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 30, 'INFO', toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 20, 'DEBUG', toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) = 10, 'TRACE', 'UNKNOWN')) AS level, LogAttributes['service'] AS service, JSONExtractString(LogAttributes['req'], 'method') AS method, JSONExtractString(LogAttributes['req'], 'url') AS path, toInt32OrNull(JSONExtractString(LogAttributes['res'], 'statusCode')) AS status_code, toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['responseTime']) AS response_time_ms, coalesce(nullIf(LogAttributes['msg'], ''), JSONExtractString(Body, 'msg')) AS message, JSONExtractString(LogAttributes['req'], 'id') AS request_id, TraceId AS trace_id, SpanId AS span_id FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE Timestamp >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND Timestamp <= toDateTime($__to/1000) AND ('${probe_logs}' = 'all' OR coalesce(nullIf(LogAttributes['msg'], ''), JSONExtractString(Body, 'msg')) NOT LIKE 'Log probe:%') ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 500

panels.title: Error & Warn rate per minute
panels.description: Per-minute count of warning and error-level log events.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(Timestamp) AS time, countIf(toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) >= 50) AS errors, countIf(toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) >= 40 AND toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) < 50) AS warnings FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE Timestamp >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND Timestamp <= toDateTime($__to/1000) AND ('${probe_logs}' = 'all' OR coalesce(nullIf(LogAttributes['msg'], ''), JSONExtractString(Body, 'msg')) NOT LIKE 'Log probe:%') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Top Error Messages (last 1h)
panels.description: Most frequent error messages to quickly spot recurring failures.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(nullIf(LogAttributes['msg'], ''), JSONExtractString(Body, 'msg')) AS message, count() AS occurrences, max(Timestamp) AS last_seen FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE Timestamp >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND Timestamp <= toDateTime($__to/1000) AND toInt32OrNull(LogAttributes['level']) >= 50 AND ('${probe_logs}' = 'all' OR coalesce(nullIf(LogAttributes['msg'], ''), JSONExtractString(Body, 'msg')) NOT LIKE 'Log probe:%') GROUP BY message ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 10
